title: Aurora, 32120, Stegosaurus Dinosaur, 13In, Soft Toy, Green, 33 cm
features: • A cuddlesome, soft exterior with squeezable plush filling
• All children love this cute, colourful and collectable character
• European safety standards met and carries the CE label therefore safe for children
• Made only from the best and softest plush materials
• Aurora World is the leading supplier of affordable, high quality gift products
description: From the manufacturer Stegosaurus Plush Toy Product Information This Stegosaurus may look fierce with its back plates but its soft patterned exterior make it a must have for any dinosaur lover with its twin colour soft exterior and a squeezable plush filling. Suitable from birth.
